title: Fastly ACL Entry
description: An individual entry within a Fastly Access Control List (ACL), representing an IP address or CIDR range used for edge access control. ACL entries are versionless and take effect immediately without requiring a new service version.

id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the ACL entry.

acl_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the parent ACL.

ip.description: An IP address or the first address of a CIDR range.

subnet.description: The CIDR subnet mask for IP ranges. A value of 32 indicates a single IP address.

negated.description: Whether the entry is negated (0 = match, 1 = do not match).

comment.description: A freeform descriptive note about the ACL entry.

created_at.description: The date and time the entry was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the entry was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the entry was deleted.
